mapper.select: SELECT * FROM customer WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM customer WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
SELECT * FROM customer WHERE tax_id = #{taxId} AND status = 1
SELECT * FROM customer WHERE customer_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%') AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO customer (customer_name, tax_id, address, phone, bank_name, bank_account, status) VALUES (#{customerName}, #{taxId}, #{address}, #{phone}, #{bankName}, #{bankAccount}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE customer SET customer_name = #{customerName}, tax_id = #{taxId}, address = #{address}, phone = #{phone}, bank_name = #{bankName}, bank_account = #{bankAccount}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: UPDATE customer SET status = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
